name: Brain Persona Webhook (reference)
_comment: Track F / Track H reference template. Copy this and set persona_pin to cpa, qa, growth, social, ux, engineering, tax-domain, trading, ea, strategy, legal, cfo, agent-ops, partnerships, brand, or infra-ops. The 2-node pattern: receive webhook payload, forward to Brain with persona_pin + channel_id, let Brain pick the model via PersonaSpec (cpa/qa -> Sonnet, ea/growth -> 4o-mini, etc).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ organization_id: 'paperwork-labs', message: $json.body.message, user_id: $json.body.user_id || 'n8n-automation', channel: 'n8n', channel_id: $json.body.channel_id || null, request_id: $json.body.request_id || ($workflow.id + '-' + Date.now()), persona_pin: 'REPLACE_WITH_PERSONA_SLUG' }) }}
